name: Exponential Smoothing (Holt-Winters)
applicable_scenarios: forecast series with level, trend, and/or seasonality
simple, robust baseline that handles seasonality natively
typical_cases: monthly retail sales with yearly seasonality
common_pitfalls: additive vs. multiplicative mismatch on series where variance grows with level
season length must be specified correctly; misspecification ruins forecasts
damped trend often beats plain Holt on long horizons
not robust to structural breaks or outliers — preprocess first
